framework.name: RFC9421 HTTP Message Signatures for Agent Requests
framework.description: Uses IETF RFC9421 standard for HTTP message signatures rather than custom authentication. Agents sign request components, merchants validate signatures using published public keys. Standardized signature_base construction from request attributes enables cryptographic non-repudiation.
framework.raw_quote: the technical processes for recognizing a Visa-approved agent, including the cryptographic standards (RFC9421), required message signature fields, and the process for validating an agent's intent

source.title: Getting Started - Trusted Agent Protocol - developer.visa.com
